productDisplayName: ADIDAS Mumbai Indians Men Blue Match Jersey
description: Composition Blue polo neck jersey made of 100% polyester engineered with ClimaCool technology, premium structured knit fabric with climacool mesh at the back for comfortable feel, has short sleeves, half zipper on the front, mesh fabric along the sides at the hem for breathability, DLF IPL and Maestro logo on the left sleeve, Mumbai Indians printed on the left chest, Mumbai Indians embroidered on the collar, adidas brand logo on the right chest, Hero logo on the front, patented adidas 3-Stripes and gold trims on the shoulders Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry, dry clean or iron on print/trims/ logo Dry in shade Warm iron The Indian Premier League has kick started. You know you have the Gods of cricket on your team - show your appreciation for their super-human efforts by wearing this Mumbai Indians match jersey from Adidas. Their motto is 'Play Like One' and you too can be part of that global team spirit which brings people together, defying all odds, to triumph at the highest level! With an all new look and design for the 2012 DLF IPL, the Climacool fabric keeps skin dry and comfortable during the heat of the day. So wear this stylish jersey and cheer for your favourite team at the IPL. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18'
